UpdateNetworkDetection.probeId: The ID of the network detection.
UpdateNetworkDetection.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. For details, see [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
UpdateNetworkDetection.name: Name of the network detection, up to 65 characters, consisting of digits, letters, and underscores.
UpdateNetworkDetection.description: Description of the network detection, up to 200 characters.
UpdateNetworkDetection.destIp: Destination IP address for the probe.
